MODULE: cosmos.automation.workflow_builder
FILE: cosmos/automation/workflow_builder.py (1264 lines)
CATEGORY: automation

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Visual Workflow Builder

"I've invented a machine that builds machines that build workflows!"

Create, edit, and execute automation workflows with a visual node-based system.

CLASSES:
- NodeType(Enum): Types of workflow nodes.
- TriggerType(Enum): Types of workflow triggers.
- ActionType(Enum): Types of workflow actions.
- WorkflowNode: A node in the workflow graph.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> 'WorkflowNode'
- WorkflowTrigger: Trigger configuration for a workflow.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> 'WorkflowTrigger'
- WorkflowExecution: Record of a workflow execution.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- Workflow: Complete workflow definition.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> 'Workflow'
  Methods: def get_node(self, node_id: str) -> Optional[WorkflowNode]
  Methods: def get_start_nodes(self) -> List[WorkflowNode]
  Methods: def get_trigger_nodes(self) -> List[WorkflowNode]
  Methods: def validate(self) -> List[str]
- WorkflowAction: Base class for workflow action executors.
  Methods: async def execute(self, config: Dict[str, Any], context: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]
- WorkflowBuilder: Visual workflow builder and executor.

Creates, manages, and executes automation
  Methods: def create_workflow(self, name: str, description: str='', tags: List[str]=None) -> Workflow
  Methods: def get_workflow(self, workflow_id: str) -> Optional[Workflow]
  Methods: def list_workflows(self, tags: List[str]=None) -> List[Workflow]
  Methods: def update_workflow(self, workflow: Workflow) -> Workflow
  Methods: def delete_workflow(self, workflow_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def clone_workflow(self, workflow_id: str, new_name: str) -> Optional[Workflow]
  Methods: def add_node(self, workflow_id: str, node_type: NodeType, name: str, config: Dict[str, Any]=None, po
  Methods: def connect_nodes(self, workflow_id: str, from_node_id: str, to_node_id: str) -> bool
